title: The Avenger
author: Jonathan Wilkins
description: Celebrate the Avengers collection in this official collector’s guide to all four Avengers films from Marvel’s The Avengers to Avengers: Endgame. Includes interviews with Robert Downey Jr. (Iron Man), Chris Evans (Captain America), Mark Ruffalo (Hulk), Chris Hemsworth (Thor), Scarlett Johansson (Black Widow), Jeremy Renner (Hawkeye) and many more. Also features stunning images from the movies, exclusive behind-the-scenes photos, and concept art.
